text:
Echoes of Cilivisations

The Métiers d'Art Tribute to Great Civilisations series invites a contemplation of ancient worlds through four distinct dials.

Pharaonic Egypt is represented by the Bust of Akhenaten, sculpted in glyptique on Egyptian limestone, framed by turquoise and champlevé stone friezes. The Assyrian Empire's Lamassu of Sargon II emerges from Italian limestone, complemented by champlevé stone and flinqué enamel. Ancient Greece's Athena of Velletri, rendered in Thasos marble glyptique, is surrounded by a black enamel frieze and stone marquetry. Finally, imperial Rome's Tiber of the Iseum Campense, also in Italian marble, is paired with a micro-mosaic and gold leaf textured base.

Each timepiece, a limited edition of 15 pieces, meticulously reflects the decorative arts and historical authenticity of its era.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

Craft As A Tribute To Great Civilisations

The Maison's profound dedication to artistry is revealed in the creation of the Métiers d'Art Tribute to Great Civilisations series.

In close collaboration with curators of @museelouvre, Vacheron Constantin's artisans embarked on a three-year journey to translate monumental masterpieces into miniature works of art. Glyptique on stone, a first for the Maison, brings the central effigies to life, while micro-mosaic, engraving, and enamelling meticulously form the intricate friezes.

Each dial requires between 120 and 220 hours of work, a testament to the relentless quest for precision and excellence of the Maison.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

Subtle Contrasts, Distinctive Signatures

The Overseas Dual Time Cardinal Points series reveals its character in the finer details.

First, a dash of contrast is introduced by the orange hands, precisely indicating the second time zone and the AM/PM function. Second, the matte anthracite grey finish on the bezel, crown, and pusher ring subtly enhances the titanium case, highlighting the cutaway notches that echo the Maison's Maltese Cross. Third, the dial itself presents a play of textures, from its grained center to the circular satin-finished inner minutes track and lacquered outer seconds track. Finally, complementing these elements, the rubber straps feature distinctive orange saddle-stitch details.

Each subtle contrast and each hidden detail contribute to the distinctive aesthetic of the Overseas Dual Time Cardinal Points models.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

The Unseen Artistry

Beneath the elegant profile of the Overseas Self-Winding Ultra-Thin, a world of meticulous craftsmanship unfolds. The Manufacture Calibre 2550, a testament to the Maison's pursuit of ultra-thin watchmaking, reveals its intricate architecture

Every component, from the innovative five-wheel gear train to the double-level flying barrel, is a study in precision. Meanwhile, the platinum micro-rotor, with its emblematic compass rose, orchestrates the timepiece's enduring performance.

Finally, through the sapphire caseback, one discovers bridges adorned with Côtes de Genève and hand-bevelling.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

Charting New Courses

The Overseas Dual Time Cardinal Points models are an invitation for a journey across the globe, with each of the four distinct dial colours paying tribute to a symbolic landscape. White evokes the frozen North, brown the vast plains of the South, green the deep forests of the West, and blue the boundless Eastern ocean.

Housed within a 41mm titanium case, these timepieces are designed for the modern explorer. The Calibre 5110 DT/3, with its dual time zones, AM/PM indicator, and date display, serves as a precise guide for every adventure.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

Two Reinterpretations Of An Icon

Vacheron Constantin unveils two new expressions of its Historiques American 1921, a timepiece born from the bold and experimental spirit of the Roaring Twenties.

The distinctive timepiece, with its characteristic 45-degree offset dial and crown, now features a grained silver-tone dial, complemented by vibrant blue Arabic numerals and hands. These 18K 5N pink gold models, available in 36.5mm and 40mm, are paired with a patinated dark blue calfskin leather strap, continuing the Maison's legacy of avant-garde design and meticulous craftsmanship.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

An Exclusive Circle Of Appreciation

Experience the captivating presence of the Les Cabinotiers Minute Repeater Tourbillon Skeleton, where every detail celebrates Vacheron Constantin’s profound expertise in Haute Horlogerie. 

Observe the mesmerising play of light and shadow and the precise dance of gears, all encased in 18K 4N pink gold.

Admire the transparent sapphire dial offering an intimate view into the mechanical heart, complemented by blue accents on the minute and seconds track.

Delve into the intricate skeletonised movement, revealing the depths of the calibre.

Certified by the Hallmark of Geneva, this watch is not merely an instrument of time; it is a wearable sculpture, a testament to a legacy that continues to unfold, inviting connoisseurs into an exclusive circle of appreciation.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

Mechanical Complexity Unveiled

Within the heart of Vacheron Constantin, a singular creation emerges: the Les Cabinotiers Minute Repeater Tourbillon Skeleton. This unique piece invites a discerning eye to explore its depths, where the movement Calibre 2755 TMR SQ reveals the timepiece's intricate architecture. One year of development was dedicated to the transformation of this movement, meticulously skeletonised to remove 40% of its main plate, yet preserving its inherent strength. 

The 473 components of the movement are adorned with nine distinct finishes: brushing flanks drawing, surface straightening, bevelling of the bridges, sandblasting of the bridges, rounding off of the tourbillon bar, mirror polishing of the hammers, circular graining, circling of the wheels, and sunburst finishing on the crown wheel core. This is not merely a watch; it is an intimate revelation of horological artistry.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

The Poetry of Springtime Blossom

The Égérie Moon Phase Spring Blossom, a limited edition of 100 pieces, emerges as a poetic interpretation where Haute Couture meets Haute Horlogerie. Encased in a 37mm 18K 5N pink gold case, its delicate pink mother-of-pearl dial captures the evanescent beauty of springtime.

The unique hand-painted calfskin strap, adorned with blossoms, elevates its elegance, complemented by two additional interchangeable straps for versatile expression. 

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

The Art of the Dial: A Microcosm of Ancient Worlds

Each Métiers d’Art Tribute to Great Civilisations creation is a testament to the Maison’s mastery of rare artistic techniques. Glyptique, micro-mosaic, engraving, and miniature painting converge on the dial, bringing to life the symbols of Pharaonic Egypt, the Assyrian Empire, Ancient Greece, and Imperial Rome. 

The central effigies, sculpted from stones of the same origin as @museelouvre’s masterpieces, are surrounded by meticulously crafted friezes. The Calibre 2460 G4/2, with its peripheral display, ensures the dial remains an unobstructed stage for this horological artistry.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

©️ Pyramide du Louvre / architecte I. M. Pei

A Journey Through Art & Culture

Vacheron Constantin, in collaboration with the @museelouvre, unveils a new Métiers d'Art series: Tribute to Great Civilisations. These four limited-edition watches draw inspiration from iconic masterpieces within the museum's Antiquities department, celebrating Pharaonic Egypt, the Assyrian Empire, Ancient Greece, and Imperial Rome. 

Each timepiece, powered by the Calibre 2460 G4/2, offers a canvas for unrivalled artistic freedom, reflecting the Maison's continuous cultural exploration and dedication to rare savoir-faire.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany

Beyond the Surface

The Overseas Self-Winding Ultra-Thin reveals the Maison's unwavering commitment to meticulous craftsmanship. Beneath the dial, the mainplate is adorned with perlage, while visible bridges showcase Côtes de Genève and hand-bevelling with internal angles. The platinum micro-rotor, featuring a polished and frosted compass rose motif, is a subtle detail of artistry.

Every component, visible or not, is immaculately finished, a testament to the savoir-faire that earns the Geneva Hallmark, confirming the quality and provenance of this exceptional timepiece.

#VacheronConstantin #OneOfNotMany
